UserSession.title: User Session
UserSession.description: Temporary session data for the user. Cleared on logout or session expiry.

uid.description: The unique identifier for the user.

lastActive.description: The last time the user was active in this session.

isAnonymous.description: Whether the user is signed in anonymously.

VaultItem.title: Vault Item
VaultItem.description: A secure item stored during the session.

/vault/{itemId}.description: Secure items stored by the user during their session.
